# Police Officer -- blocks path to the lakefront

label LakeElixSouth_Officer
pory lock
faceplayer
gotoif FLAG_MET_OFFICER LakeElixSouth_Officer_After
msg "Hold it right there!\p... Wait. You're the CHAMPION,\naren't you?\pI almost didn't recognize you.\nYou look... rough. Are you okay?$"
msg "Listen, the lakefront is locked\ndown right now.\pWe've had reports of TEAM ROCKET\nactivity in the area.\pI can't let anyone through, not\neven you. Not like this.\pHead south to SHIRUBE TOWN.\nThe POKeMON LEAGUE can help\lcoordinate from there.$"
flag set FLAG_MET_OFFICER
pory release
pory end

label LakeElixSouth_Officer_After
msg "I'm sorry, CHAMPION.\nI can't let you through yet.\pSHIRUBE TOWN is to the south.\nPlease, get help from the LEAGUE.$"
pory release
pory end
